overall.description: A cinematic sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a descent through the Arasaka Corporation's industrial elevator shaft. The clip begins with a brief view of a dimly lit office control room before transitioning to a steady downward movement through a multi-level facility with dramatic red emergency lighting and lockdown signage, eventually fading into darker, deeper shaft levels.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a dimly lit, empty office control room with rows of computer workstations. The space is quiet and devoid of personnel, with only the glow of monitor screens providing illumination before the scene abruptly transitions.

scene_state.functional_zone: Arasaka elevator shaft with red emergency lockdown lighting

events.description: entering the Arasaka facility elevator shaft with prominent red emergency lighting
passing the illuminated Arasaka lockdown signage while maintaining steady descent

agents.ego_description: descending steadily in an elevator platform through the red-lit industrial shaft, passing multiple floor levels

entered.detail: large illuminated red sign displaying 'arasaka LOCKDOWN' text on the right wall
heavy industrial support beams painted red running vertically through the shaft
grated metal platforms and walkways visible on the left side of the shaft
transparent glass panels forming the elevator shaft enclosure
red emergency lighting strips illuminating the shaft walls

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a descent through the Arasaka Corporation's industrial elevator shaft, bathed in intense red emergency lighting. The camera moves steadily downward past the prominent 'LOCKDOWN' signage and red structural beams, with metal walkways visible on the sides of the narrow shaft.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep elevator shaft with minimal ambient lighting

events.description: red neon lighting fades to darker ambient lighting as the descent continues into lower levels
passing through deeper shaft sections with reduced visibility and distant platform lights

agents.ego_description: continuing the descent through darker, deeper levels of the facility shaft with minimal red lighting

entered.detail: the deep central shaft opening becoming visible as the descent continues
distant white ceiling lights visible at the top of the shaft
faint green and red indicator lights on distant lower platforms
square illuminated panels on the ceiling of the shaft

segments.scene_description: As the descent continues, the intense red lighting gives way to darker, more ambient illumination. The camera moves through the deeper sections of the Arasaka shaft, with the lockdown signage now passed and the environment becoming progressively darker, revealing the vast vertical depth of the facility.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sterile, quiet office environment into a deep, ominous industrial descent. It begins in a dimly lit control room filled with empty computer workstations, where the only light emanates from glowing monitor screens. The scene then abruptly shifts into a steady downward plunge through the Arasaka Corporation's elevator shaft, where the atmosphere becomes saturated with intense red emergency lighting and prominent lockdown signage. As the camera continues its descent past metal walkways and structural beams, the vivid red glow gradually fades into darker, more ambient illumination. The movement finally carries the viewer into the deepest sections of the facility, where the environment becomes progressively darker to reveal the vast vertical depth of the shaft.
